name: Centenary Collection Fat Quarter Bundle
best_for: Taupe quilts, Japanese-style patchwork projects
expert_note: Lecien's Centenary Collection is the gold standard for Japanese taupe quilting. These muted, earthy tones are the heart of the Japanese patchwork aesthetic.

name: Flower Sugar Maison Fat Quarter Bundle
best_for: Floral quilts, applique projects, doll quilts
expert_note: Flower Sugar is one of Lecien's most beloved lines. The small-scale prints work perfectly for patchwork pieces that need detail without overwhelming the design.

name: Mrs. March's Collection Fat Quarter Bundle
best_for: Traditional patchwork, English paper piecing
expert_note: Mrs. March's Collection bridges the gap between Japanese precision manufacturing and English garden aesthetics. A staple in many quilters' fabric libraries.

name: Melange Cotton Solid Fat Quarter Bundle
best_for: Backgrounds, sashing, modern quilts needing texture
expert_note: Unlike flat solids, Lecien Melange has a subtle heathered texture that adds visual interest. Perfect as backgrounds for taupe patchwork.

name: Cotton Printed Quilting Fabric - Floral
best_for: Patchwork, quilting, small craft projects
expert_note: Cosmo Textiles maintains excellent print quality across their cotton lines. The tight weave makes these fabrics easy to cut and sew with precision.

name: Linen-Cotton Blend Quilting Fabric
best_for: Bags, home decor quilts, mixed-media projects
expert_note: The linen-cotton blend gives a rustic texture that pairs beautifully with Japanese taupe fabrics. A favorite for bag-making among Japanese quilters.

name: Embroidery Floss for Quilting - 25 Skeins
best_for: Hand quilting embellishment, decorative stitching
expert_note: Cosmo embroidery floss is prized for its silky finish and minimal tangling. Many Japanese quilters use it for decorative hand-quilting stitches.

name: Sashiko Thread - 100m Skein
best_for: Sashiko stitching, visible mending, decorative quilting
expert_note: Olympus sashiko thread is the industry standard in Japan. The tight twist prevents fraying and creates clean, defined stitches.

name: Sashiko Needles - Assorted Pack
best_for: Sashiko, running stitch quilting, hand stitching
expert_note: Sashiko needles are longer than standard needles, allowing you to load multiple stitches before pulling through. Essential for efficient sashiko work.

name: Pre-Printed Sashiko Fabric Panel - Asanoha
pros: Pattern printed and ready to stitch
best_for: Sashiko beginners, coaster and placemat projects
expert_note: Pre-printed panels take the guesswork out of sashiko. The Asanoha (hemp leaf) pattern is one of the most iconic traditional Japanese designs.

name: Kogin Embroidery Kit - Coaster Set
best_for: Kogin embroidery beginners, gift-making
expert_note: Kogin is a form of counted-thread embroidery from northern Japan. Olympus kits include everything needed to create traditional geometric patterns.

name: Pre-Printed Sashiko Fabric Panel - Seigaiha
best_for: Sashiko table runners, wall hangings
expert_note: Seigaiha (blue sea waves) is a flowing pattern that creates a meditative stitching experience. The curves make it a step up from grid-based patterns.

name: Patchwork Seam Roller
best_for: English paper piecing, on-the-go quilting
expert_note: Clover's seam roller replaces a hot iron for pressing seams flat. Indispensable for EPP and travel quilting.

name: Water-Soluble Marking Pen
pros: Visible on light and dark fabrics
best_for: Marking quilting lines, applique placement, pattern transfer
expert_note: Clover marking pens are a staple in Japanese quilting. The fine tip allows precise marking for hand-quilting designs.

name: Patchwork Templates - Hexagon Set
best_for: English paper piecing, hexagon quilts, grandmother's flower garden
expert_note: Clover templates are laser-cut for precision. The hexagon set covers sizes from tiny to large, perfect for EPP projects.

name: Rotary Cutter 45mm
best_for: Cutting fabric strips, trimming quilt blocks
expert_note: Clover rotary cutters are designed with quilter ergonomics in mind. The safety lock and soft grip make extended cutting sessions comfortable.

name: Protect and Grip Thimble
best_for: Hand quilting, hand sewing, needle pushing
expert_note: Japanese hand quilters swear by proper thimbles. Clover's design combines leather comfort with a metal tip for pushing needles through layers.

name: Patchwork Needles - Assorted
best_for: Hand piecing, hand quilting, precision stitching
expert_note: Tulip needles from Hiroshima are considered the finest in the world. The manufacturing process creates a needle that glides through cotton with almost no resistance.

name: Applique Needles - Size 10
best_for: Needle-turn applique, invisible stitching
expert_note: Size 10 applique needles are tiny but mighty. Tulip's ultra-fine points allow near-invisible stitches that are the hallmark of Japanese applique work.

name: Sashiko Needles - Long Type
best_for: Sashiko, running stitch patterns, boro mending
expert_note: Tulip sashiko needles are a premium alternative to Olympus. The Hiroshima-made steel holds its point longer and glides more smoothly.

name: Cotton Linen Canvas - Natural Print
pros: Great for bags and home decor
best_for: Tote bags, cushion covers, sturdy quilted items
expert_note: Kokka's cotton-linen canvas is heavier than quilting cotton, making it ideal for bags and structured projects. Their print designs are distinctly Japanese.

name: Double Gauze - Floral Print
best_for: Baby quilts, lightweight blankets, garments
expert_note: Japanese double gauze is unmatched in softness. Two thin layers are woven together creating a fabric that gets softer with every wash.

name: Live Life Collection Fat Quarter Bundle
best_for: Vintage-style quilts, romantic patchwork, EPP
expert_note: Yuwa's Live Life Collection captures a vintage European feel with Japanese precision. These prints are favorites among quilters who love a soft, romantic aesthetic.

name: Taupe Fabric Fat Quarter Bundle
best_for: Japanese-style taupe quilts, mixed-fabric projects
expert_note: Yuwa taupe fabrics have a slightly warmer undertone than Lecien's. Mixing both brands creates depth in taupe quilt projects.

name: Vintage Rose Print Cotton
best_for: Vintage quilts, cushion covers, small projects
expert_note: Yuwa's vintage rose prints have a pre-washed softness that gives quilts an heirloom quality from the start.

name: Classic Japanese Prints - Seigaiha
best_for: Japanese-themed quilts, accent fabric, craft projects
expert_note: Sevenberry specializes in classic Japanese patterns like seigaiha, asanoha, and sakura. A great entry point for adding Japanese elements to any quilt.

name: Classic Japanese Prints - Sakura
best_for: Spring quilts, Japanese-themed projects, accent fabric
expert_note: Cherry blossom prints are timeless in Japanese textile tradition. Sevenberry's sakura prints are well-scaled for patchwork cutting.

name: Quilts Made with Love (English Edition)
best_for: Learning Japanese taupe quilting style, pattern inspiration
expert_note: Yoko Saito is the undisputed master of Japanese taupe quilting. Her books showcase the muted palette and intricate hand-piecing that define the style.

name: Stroll Through the Seasons (English Edition)
best_for: Seasonal quilt projects, Japanese quilting techniques
expert_note: This book organizes projects by season, reflecting the Japanese appreciation for seasonal changes. Templates are full-size and ready to trace.

name: Floral Applique Designs (English Edition)
best_for: Needle-turn applique, floral quilt design
expert_note: Akemi Shibata's applique work is known for lifelike floral designs. Her books teach the needle-turn technique that Japanese quilters are famous for.

name: Dimensional Flower Quilts (English Edition)
best_for: Dimensional quilting, art quilts, intermediate to advanced quilters
expert_note: Reiko Kato pioneered dimensional flower techniques in quilting. Her flowers rise from the quilt surface, creating stunning three-dimensional effects.

name: Sashiko Starter Kit - Asanoha Pattern
material: Cotton fabric, sashiko thread, needle, thimble
best_for: Sashiko beginners, gift for crafters
expert_note: The complete starter kit removes all barriers to trying sashiko. Includes pre-printed fabric, thread, needle, and a thimble.

name: Patchwork Scissors - Fine Point
best_for: Trimming seam allowances, clipping curves, applique cutting
expert_note: Clover's fine-point scissors are designed specifically for patchwork detail work. The micro-serrations grip fabric for clean cuts without slipping.

name: Quilting Pins - Extra Fine 100pc
best_for: Pinning quilt layers, securing patchwork pieces
expert_note: Extra-fine pins are essential for Japanese patchwork where precision matters. Glass heads won't melt under an iron.
